first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the reasoning across the justification, strengths, and concerns is substantively the same. Both evaluations correctly identify the same key skill gaps (lack of recent C++, no experience with IEC 62443) as the reason for the low score. The minor differences in phrasing are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and do not indicate that the change in work location from Western/European cities to Brazil influenced the assessment.
